title: Knowledge
lead: Long-lived libraries that any conversation can call into. Upload documents once, ask anywhere.
emptyBody: A library binds a set of documents to one embedding model. Create one to get started.

dialog.title: New knowledge library
dialog.body: The embedding model is locked once you upload the first document — it determines the vector space.
dialog.name: Name

detail.noDocsBody: Upload a PDF, Markdown or text file and Aurelia indexes it for retrieval.
detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this library and all its documents?
